subject: feat(a11y): wire focus trap, Home/End keys, and disabled items to HamburgerMenu
body:
Extract useDisclosureFocus hook from HamburgerMenu's inlined focus
logic (focus-first-on-open, return-to-trigger-on-close). Add optional
externalRef parameter to useFocusTrap for callers that manage their
own ref (backward-compatible — 4 existing callers unchanged). Wire
both hooks into HamburgerMenu so Tab is trapped within the open menu.
Add Home/End key support alongside ArrowDown/ArrowUp. Add disabled
item support with opacity-40 styling, HTML disabled attribute, and
keyboard-nav skip via button:not([disabled]) selector.

Tags: a11y, hamburger-menu, hooks, keyboard-nav, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: burger-menu-completion
Semver: minor

title: wire focus trap, Home/End keys, and disabled items to HamburgerMenu
